text:
CNDCT_MENTL_STUS_DSCHRG_CD Brief Interview - Mental Status (BIMS) (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the facility felt a brief mental status interview should be conducted. 0 = No (patient is rarely/never understood)
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
460 WORD_RPTTN_1ST_ATMPT_DSCHRG_CD WORD_RPTTN_1ST_ATMPT_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Repetition of Three Words (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was able to repeat
